programs.name: Scratch: Creative Coding
programs.tagline: Kids build their first games and animations using visual blocks.
programs.description: Scratch is the perfect first language for kids. By the end of the year, every student has built 5+ projects they can show their parents.

programs.name: Python: Real Code
programs.tagline: From text-based scripts to real programs. The same language used at Google and NASA.
programs.description: Students who finish Scratch move into Python and start writing real code — text-based, project-driven, and with measurable progress.

programs.name: Robotics: Hands-On STEM
programs.tagline: Physical robots, sensors, motors. Hands-on STEM that doesn't sit behind a screen.
programs.description: Robotics combines coding with engineering. Kids build, program, and test real machines — and parents see something they can hold.
